ElementDescription: Based upon the patient's response from mssi_9: Other safety factors

Also inquire about alcohol and/or drug use, particularly the extent to which it affects the patient's impulse control:
Safety Factors Prevention
Notes: 0=Convincing evidence that s/he will not make a suicide attempt, and good impulse control; 1=Nothing preventing patient from attempting suicide, or questionable impulse control

ElementDescription: Criterion A: Thoughts about suicide, strong wish to die, or past history of suicide attempt. Check YES if any of the following endorsed: attempted suicide in past month, any previous attempt requiring medical attention, wish to die is strong, considered a method in past month, (i.e., thoughts of committing suicide but has not considered a method) or intent is uncertain/not sure
Notes: 0=No; 1=Yes

ElementDescription: Suicide Risk Code
Notes: 0=Mild Risk; 1=Intermediate Risk: Reportable; 2=High Risk: Urgent

ElementDescription: If Yes to mssi_criteriona, proceed to Criterion B. If No, stop and code...MILD RISK

Criterion B. Suicide intent, nothing preventing patient from attempting suicide, or questionable impulse control. If Yes on Criterion A, and if intent is ''certain'' or nothing preventing is..HIGH RISK; If No on Criterion B, consider patient Intermediate risk, make contract, and report...INTERMEDIATE RISK
Reviewed with:
Plan
Client Response
Needed follow up
Checks if completed
